items.title: Christine Lagarde: Back to basics in an uncertain environment

Met with German Foreign Minister @AussenMinDE today to discuss the situation in the Middle East and reiterated our shared commitment to ensuring Iran never obtains or develops a nuclear weapon. We also reaffirmed the need for NATO burden shifting and a durable peace between Russia and Ukraine.
items.summary: Met with German Foreign Minister @AussenMinDE today to discuss the situation in the Middle East and reiterated our shared commitment to ensuring Iran never obtains or develops a nuclear weapon. We also reaffirmed the need for NATO burden shifting and a durable peace between Russia and Ukraine.

items.title: Senior South African police officer survives assassination attempt
items.summary: Deputy crime intelligence boss Maj-Gen Feroz Khan was due to appear before an inquiry into police corruption this week.

items.title: Fossil Fuel Subsidies to Hit $1 Trillion in War’s Energy Price Shock, UN Says
items.summary: Fossil fuel subsidies are projected to reach $1.1 trillion in 2026 as governments spend more to shield consumers from high energy prices triggered by the war in Iran.

items.title: Russia could attack Nato one year after Ukraine war , Dutch minister warns as Kremlin threatens Finland over its nuke deployment stance
June Payrolls Expected to Boost Rate-Hike Bets
items.summary:
The FOMC’s tone at the June meeting, together with Chairman Kevin Warsh’s news conference, has raised the prospect of a near-term rate hike. 
Aditya Bhave, Head: US Economics at Bank of America, discusses the Fed and his interest rate outlook for the remainder of 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: “The choice between immediate de-escalation and dangerous escalation is starkly clear.” Briefing the Security Council on the war in Ukraine, top @UNDPPA official stresses the need for dialogue and diplomacy to prevent a broader regional conflict. https://dppa.un.org/en/news/asg-pobee-calls-for-immediate-ceasefire-to-prevent-wider-regional-conflict-in-europe
items.summary:
“The choice between immediate de-escalation and dangerous escalation is starkly clear.”

Briefing the Security Council on the war in Ukraine, top @UNDPPA official stresses the need for dialogue and diplomacy to prevent a broader regional conflict.

items.title: No Choice But the Atomic Bomb : MAGA Expert Slams Trump Foreign Policy as Iran Rushes for Nuclear Weapon
ECB does not need to fight inflation with ‘same force’ as in 2022-23, Lagarde says
items.summary: President of central bank signals there could be a modest increase in interest rates

items.title: Lagarde Says Europe Is Getting More Resilient to Economic Shocks
items.summary: Europe is becoming less vulnerable to outside shocks thanks to a better financial framework and progress on the green transition, Christine Lagarde said.

items.title: NZ Rate Hike Bets Dialed Back on US-Iran Peace Progress
items.summary: New Zealand economists are dialing back expectations for a Reserve Bank interest-rate increase next week, saying early signs of peace between the US and Iran have eased inflation risks enough to justify keeping borrowing costs on hold.

items.title: Lagarde Says European Banking System More Resilient to Shocks
items.summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde says Europe is becoming less vulnerable to outside shocks thanks to a better financial framework and progress on the green transition. She speaks during her institution’s annual retreat in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: El nuevo agujero de Chernóbil no fue un accidente nuclear , sino una advertencia de guerra . El ataque con dron al sarcófago muestra cómo los reactores civiles pueden convertirse en rehenes militares
HDFC Bank Appoints Ex-Bureaucrat Rajiv Kumar as Part-Time Chair
items.summary: HDFC Bank Ltd. named former finance secretary, Rajiv Kumar, as its part-time chairman, months after the abrupt resignation of Atanu Chakraborty sparked questions about governance at the nation’s largest private lender.
